---
title: "Homepage"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
author:
  - "Aleksandar Neshov"
  - "Dinh Marcus Nguyen"
  - "Alexander Toropov"
date: today
---

## About the project

This website documents our StatProg2 group project. We use tourism data from Munich to explore patterns, trends, and insights in a clear and reproducible way.

## Pages

- [Proposal](pages/proposal.qmd): introduces the project motivation, research questions, dataset, and planned analytical approach.
- [Analysis](pages/analysis.qmd): presents the exploratory data analysis and interactive visualisations of Munich tourism, including COVID-19 recovery patterns in visitor arrivals and overnight stays.
- [Group Reflection](pages/group_reflection.qmd): provides a structured reflection on the dataset, analytical choices, collaboration, and skills developed during the project.
- [Contributing](pages/contributing.qmd): explains the team’s workflow, division of tasks, and contribution guidelines for the project.

## Data

Our project uses the Munich open data tourism dataset:

- [Monatszahlen Tourismus](https://opendata.muenchen.de/dataset/monatszahlen-tourismus)

## Goal

The aim of the website is to present the project as a small **data story**: what question we ask, how we analyze the data, what we find and why the results matter.
